version: MARKET_BASE retail market presence master v90 merged from v9/v15/v17/v18/v20/v42 + retail_channels_full196
principle: Merged existing retail presence files instead of treating v42 as the sole source. Attach retail presence to the country/region where the chain operates. Store count appears only when scoped; official/semi-official/reference labels are preserved.
